name: list_alerts_from_incident
description: List alerts for a specific incident.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: get_alert_from_incident
description: Get a specific alert from an incident.

name: list_change_events
description: List all change events with optional filtering. Change Events represent changes to systems, services, and applications that can be correlated with incidents to provide context for troubleshooting.

query_model.description: Query parameters for filtering change events

limit.description: The number of results per page

offset.description: The offset of the first record returned

total.description: By default the total field is not included. Set to true to include it

team_ids.description: An array of team IDs. Only results related to these teams will be returned

integration_ids.description: An array of integration IDs. Only results related to these integrations will be returned

since.description: The start of the date range over which you want to search

until.description: The end of the date range over which you want to search

name: get_change_event
description: Get a specific change event by ID.

change_event_id.description: The ID of the change event

name: list_service_change_events
description: List change events for a specific service.

query_model.description: Query parameters for filtering change events

limit.description: The number of results per page

offset.description: The offset of the first record returned

total.description: By default the total field is not included. Set to true to include it

since.description: The start of the date range over which you want to search

until.description: The end of the date range over which you want to search

name: list_incident_change_events
description: List change events for a specific incident.

query_model.description: Query parameters for filtering change events

limit.description: The number of results per page

offset.description: The offset of the first record returned

total.description: By default the total field is not included. Set to true to include it

since.description: The start of the date range over which you want to search

until.description: The end of the date range over which you want to search

name: list_incidents
description: List incidents with optional filtering.

since.description: Filter incidents since a specific date

until.description: Filter incidents until a specific date

request_scope.description: Filter incidents by request scope. Either all, my teams or assigned to me

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. The maximum is 1000

sort_by.description: Used to specify both the field you wish to sort the results on (incident_number/created_at/resolved_at/urgency), as well as the direction (asc/desc)

name: get_incident
description: Get a specific incident.

incident_id.description: The ID or number of the incident to retrieve

query_model.description: Optional query parameters for additional information to include

include.description: List of additional information to include. Available options: 'users', 'services', 'assignments', 'acknowledgers', 'custom_fields', 'teams', 'escalation_policies', 'notes', 'urgencies', 'priorities'

name: get_outlier_incident
description: Get Outlier Incident information for a given Incident on its Service. Outlier Incident returns incident that deviates from the expected patterns for the same Service. This feature is currently available as part of the Event Intelligence package or Digital Operations plan only.

since.description: The start of the date range over which you want to search. Maximum range is 6 months.

name: get_past_incidents
description: Get Past Incidents related to a specific incident ID. Returns Incidents within the past 6 months that have similar metadata and were generated on the same Service. Available as part of the Event Intelligence package or Digital Operations plan only.

query_model.description: Query parameters including limit and total flag

limit.description: The number of results to be returned. Default is 50, maximum is 999.

total.description: Include the total number of Past Incidents in the response.

name: get_related_incidents
description: Get Related Incidents for a specific incident ID. Returns the 20 most recent Related Incidents that are impacting other Responders and Services. Available as part of the Event Intelligence package or Digital Operations plan only.

additional_details.description: Array of additional attributes. Allowed values are 'incident'

name: list_incident_notes
description: List all notes for a specific incident.

incident_id.description: The ID of the incident to retrieve notes from

name: list_incident_workflows
description: List incident workflows with optional filtering.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. The maximum is 100

query.description: Filters the result, showing only the records whose name matches the query

include.description: Array of additional details to include

name: get_incident_workflow
description: Get a specific incident workflow.

workflow_id.description: The ID of the incident workflow to retrieve

name: list_services
description: List services with optional filtering.

query.description: Filters the result, showing only the records whose name matches the query

limit.description: Pagination limit

name: get_service
description: Get a specific service by ID.

service_id.description: The ID of the service to retrieve

name: list_teams
description: List teams based on the provided query model.

query_model.description: The model containing the query parameters

scope.description: Scope of the query. 'all' for all teams, 'my' for teams the user is a member of

query.description: Filters the result, showing only the records whose name matches the query

limit.description: Pagination limit

name: get_team
description: Get a specific team.

team_id.description: The ID or name of the team to retrieve

name: list_team_members
description: List members of a team.

name: get_user_data
description: Get the current user's data.

name: list_users
description: List users, optionally filtering by name (query) and team IDs.

query.description: Filters the result, showing only the records whose name matches the query

limit.description: Pagination limit

name: list_schedules
description: List schedules with optional filtering.

query.description: Filter schedules by name or description

include.description: Include additional details in response, such as 'schedule_layers'

limit.description: Pagination limit

name: get_schedule
description: Get a specific schedule by ID.

schedule_id.description: The ID of the schedule to retrieve

name: list_schedule_users
description: List users in a schedule.

name: list_oncalls
description: List on-call schedules with optional filtering.

time_zone.description: Time zone in which dates should be rendered (e.g., 'America/New_York')

since.description: Start of timerange - defaults to current time

until.description: End of timerange - defaults to current time

earliest.description: Return only the earliest oncall for each combination of user and escalation policy

limit.description: Pagination limit

name: list_log_entries
description: List all log entries across the account. Log entries are records of all events on your account. If no time range is specified, defaults to the last 7 days.

query_model.description: Query parameters including since, until, limit, and offset

since.description: The start of the date range to search

until.description: The end of the date range to search

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

is_overview.description: If true, returns only the most important changes to the incident

include.description: Array of additional models to include. Options: 'incidents', 'services', 'channels', 'teams'

team_ids.description: Filter log entries by team IDs

total.description: Include total count of log entries in the response

name: get_log_entry
description: Get a specific log entry by ID.

log_entry_id.description: The ID of the log entry

name: list_escalation_policies
description: List escalation policies with optional filtering.

query.description: Filter escalation policies by name or description

user_ids.description: Filter escalation policies by user IDs

team_ids.description: Filter escalation policies by team IDs

include.description: Include additional details in response, such as 'services' or 'teams'

limit.description: Pagination limit

name: get_escalation_policy
description: Get a specific escalation policy.

policy_id.description: The ID of the escalation policy to retrieve

name: list_event_orchestrations
description: List event orchestrations with optional filtering.

limit.description: The number of results per page.

offset.description: Offset to start pagination search results.

sort_by.description: Used to specify the field you wish to sort the results on.

name: get_event_orchestration
description: Get details for a specific event orchestration.

orchestration_id.description: The ID of the event orchestration to retrieve

name: get_event_orchestration_router
description: Get the router configuration for a specific event orchestration.

orchestration_id.description: The ID of the event orchestration to retrieve router for

name: get_event_orchestration_service
description: Get the Service Orchestration configuration for a specific service.

service_id.description: The ID of the service to retrieve the orchestration configuration for

name: get_event_orchestration_global
description: Get the Global Orchestration configuration for a specific event orchestration.

orchestration_id.description: The ID of the event orchestration to retrieve global configuration for

name: list_alert_grouping_settings
description: List all alert grouping settings with optional filtering.

service_ids.description: An array of service IDs. Only results related to these services will be returned.

limit.description: The number of results per page.

after.description: Cursor to retrieve next page; only present if next page exists.

before.description: Cursor to retrieve previous page; only present if not on first page.

total.description: Set to true for the total field to be populated.

name: get_alert_grouping_setting
description: Get details for a specific alert grouping setting.

setting_id.description: The ID of the alert grouping setting to retrieve

name: list_status_pages
description: List Status Pages with optional filtering.

status_page_type.description: Filter by the type of the Status Page

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: list_status_page_severities
description: List Severities for a Status Page by Status Page ID.

status_page_id.description: The ID of the Status Page

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: list_status_page_impacts
description: List Impacts for a Status Page by Status Page ID.

status_page_id.description: The ID of the Status Page

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: list_status_page_statuses
description: List Statuses for a Status Page by Status Page ID.

status_page_id.description: The ID of the Status Page

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: get_status_page_post
description: Get a Post for a Status Page by Status Page ID and Post ID.

status_page_id.description: The ID of the Status Page

post_id.description: The ID of the Status Page Post

include.description: Array of additional Models to include in response

name: list_status_page_post_updates
description: List Post Updates for a Status Page by Status Page ID and Post ID.

status_page_id.description: The ID of the Status Page

post_id.description: The ID of the Status Page Post

reviewed_status.description: Filter by the reviewed status of the Post Update to retrieve

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: create_alert_grouping_setting
description: Create a new alert grouping setting.

type.description: The type of alert grouping configuration

name: update_alert_grouping_setting
description: Update an existing alert grouping setting.

setting_id.description: The ID of the alert grouping setting to update

name: delete_alert_grouping_setting
description: Delete an alert grouping setting.

setting_id.description: The ID of the alert grouping setting to delete

name: create_incident
description: Create an incident.

service.description: The service associated with the incident

name: manage_incidents
description: Manage one or more incidents by changing its status, urgency, assignment, or escalation level. Use this tool when you want to bulk update incidents.

incident_ids.description: The IDs of the incidents to manage

assignement.description: The user to assign the incident to

status.description: The status to set the incident to

urgency.description: The urgency to set the incident to

escalation_level.description: The escalation level to set the incident to

name: add_responders
description: Add responders to an incident.

incident_id.description: The ID of the incident to add responders to

message.description: Optional message to include with the responder request

responder_request_targets.description: Array of user or escalation policy IDs to request as responders

id.description: The ID of the user or escalation policy

name: add_note_to_incident
description: Add a note to an incident.

incident_id.description: The ID of the incident to add a note to

note.description: The note text to be added

name: start_incident_workflow
description: Start an incident workflow instance.

workflow_id.description: The ID of the workflow to start

id.description: An identifier to help differentiate between workflow executions

name: create_service
description: Create a new service. The escalation_policy reference only requires the 'id' field. Example: {"id": "PXXXXXX"}

service_data.description: The data for the new service. Do not include the ID since it is auto-generated.

name: update_service
description: Update an existing service.

service_id.description: The ID of the service to update

name: create_team
description: Create a team.

description.description: A short description of the team

default_role.description: The default role for new users added to the team

name: update_team
description: Update a team.

team_id.description: The ID of the team to update

name: delete_team
description: Delete a team.

team_id.description: The ID of the team to delete

name: add_team_member
description: Add a user to a team.

team_id.description: The ID of the team to add the user to

user_id.description: The ID of the user to add to the team

role.description: The role of the user in the team

name: remove_team_member
description: Remove a user from a team.

user_id.description: The ID of the user to remove

name: create_schedule
description: Create a new on-call schedule. Each schedule layer requires a 'name' field to identify the layer.

time_zone.description: The time zone using IANA format (e.g., 'America/New_York')

rotation_virtual_start.description: Effective start of the layer (ISO datetime)

rotation_turn_length_seconds.description: Duration of each on-call shift in seconds

users.description: Ordered list of users on this layer

restrictions.description: Array of time restrictions for the layer

name: create_schedule_override
description: Create an override for a schedule. Each override requires 'start' (ISO datetime), 'end' (ISO datetime), and 'user_id' (the user's PagerDuty ID).

schedule_id.description: The ID of the schedule to override

overrides.description: The list of overrides to create

name: update_schedule
description: Update an existing schedule.

schedule_id.description: The ID of the schedule to update

id.description: The ID of the schedule to update (optional if provided in path)

name: update_event_orchestration_router
description: Update the router configuration for a specific event orchestration.

orchestration_id.description: The ID of the event orchestration

orchestration_path.description: The orchestration router path configuration to update

name: append_event_orchestration_router_rule
description: Append a new routing rule to the end of an event orchestration's router rules. Retrieves the current router config, appends the new rule, and updates the router.

orchestration_id.description: The ID of the event orchestration

label.description: A description of this rule's purpose.

conditions.description: Conditions evaluated to check if an event matches. Rule matches if any condition matches.

actions.description: Actions taken when an event matches this rule

name: create_status_page_post
description: Create a Post for a Status Page by Status Page ID. All posts require starts_at, ends_at, and at least one update.

status_page_id.description: The ID of the Status Page

title.description: The title given to a Post

starts_at.description: When the post becomes effective (ISO datetime)

ends_at.description: When the post is concluded (ISO datetime)

updates.description: At least one update is required

name: create_status_page_post_update
description: Create a Post Update for a Post by Post ID. Adds a new update to an existing status page post.

status_page_id.description: The ID of the Status Page

post_id.description: The ID of the Status Page Post

message.description: The message text for the update
